changes.value:
Write integration tests that prove ane-embedding works end-to-end with the CoreML backend on Apple Silicon, and benchmark ANE vs the llama-embedding CPU path.

**Tests (ane-embedding/tests/integration_test.rs):**
- [ ] test_load_model — load .mlpackage, verify is_loaded and embedding_dimension
- [ ] test_embed_single_text — embed text, verify 1024-dim output
- [ ] test_embed_consistency — same text produces same embedding
- [ ] test_different_texts_differ — different texts produce different embeddings
- [ ] test_normalization — normalized embeddings have magnitude ~1.0
- [ ] test_trait_object — works as &dyn TextEmbedder
- [ ] test_batch_processing — BatchProcessor works with ANE backend
- [ ] test_cosine_similarity — similar texts have high similarity, dissimilar texts have low

**Benchmark (optional):**
- [ ] Compare embed_text latency: ane-embedding vs llama-embedding for same text
- [ ] Report: embeddings/second for both backends
- [ ] Verify ANE is actually being used (check Activity Monitor or powermetrics for ANE utilization)

**Checklist:**
- [ ] All integration tests pass
- [ ] Benchmark results documented
ANE embedding integration tests and benchmarks

+Write integration tests and Criterion benchmarks comparing ane-embedding (ANE) vs llama-embedding (CPU).

**Benchmark crate: `benches/embedding_benchmark/`**
- New workspace member with its own Cargo.toml
- Depends on both `llama-embedding` and `ane-embedding`
- Uses Criterion for statistical benchmarking
- Benchmarks: single embed latency, throughput (embeds/sec), batch processing
- Compare ANE vs CPU for same input texts

**Integration tests (ane-embedding/tests/integration_test.rs):**
- [ ] test_load_model — load .mlpackage, verify is_loaded and embedding_dimension
- [ ] test_embed_single_text — embed text, verify 1024-dim output
- [ ] test_embed_consistency — same text produces same embedding
- [ ] test_different_texts_differ — different texts produce different embeddings
- [ ] test_normalization — normalized embeddings have magnitude ~1.0
- [ ] test_trait_object — works as &dyn TextEmbedder
- [ ] test_batch_processing — BatchProcessor works with ANE backend
- [ ] test_cosine_similarity — similar texts have high similarity, dissimilar texts have low

**Benchmark checklist:**
- [ ] Create `benches/embedding_benchmark/Cargo.toml` with criterion, llama-embedding, ane-embedding deps
- [ ] Create `benches/embedding_benchmark/benches/embed_bench.rs` with Criterion benchmarks
- [ ] Add `benches/embedding_benchmark` to workspace members in root Cargo.toml
- [ ] Benchmark: single text embed latency (ANE vs CPU)
- [ ] Benchmark: batch embed throughput (ANE vs CPU)
- [ ] Verify ANE is actually being used (Activity Monitor / powermetrics for ANE utilization)
- [ ] All integration tests pass
- [ ] Benchmark runs and produces results
\ No newline at end of file
